techniques.evidence_quote: the attacker was targeting the SNS service with a long-term access key beginning with AKIA
attacker attempting and failing to enumerate the settings for sending SMS messages (GetSMSAttributes) in 10 AWS regions over a period of five minutes
sts:GetCallerIdentity | "What are the credentials I compromised?"
use the AWS SNS API call Publish to send out SMS messages with their phishing links
running a phishing campaign impersonating the French government and had successfully phished user PII and credit card information

attack_chain.description: Attacker obtained and used compromised long-term AWS access keys (AKIA prefix) to access the victim AWS environment.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the attacker was targeting the SNS service with a long-term access key beginning with AKIA

attack_chain.description: Attacker enumerated AWS SNS SMS sending capabilities by calling GetSMSAttributes across 10 AWS regions in ~5 minutes from IP 134.209.127.249, attempting to identify SMS spend limits and sandbox status.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: IP address 134[.]209.127.249 was running the GetSMSAttributes API call across multiple regions, in a short period of time

attack_chain.description: Intended/attempted abuse of AWS SNS Publish API to send out smishing SMS messages containing links to attacker-hosted French government impersonation phishing sites (attempts failed in this case).
attack_chain.evidence_quote: use the AWS SNS API call Publish to send out SMS messages with their phishing links

attack_chain.description: Attacker operated phishing sites impersonating the French government (fine payment portals) on the same infrastructure, harvesting victim PII and credit card details, exfiltrated via Telegram bot API.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: running a phishing campaign impersonating the French government and had successfully phished user PII and credit card information

evidence_chunks.quote: running a phishing campaign impersonating the French government and had successfully phished user PII and credit card information
running a phishing campaign impersonating the French government and had successfully phished user PII and credit card information

initial_access_vector: Compromised long-term AWS IAM access keys (AKIA) used from attacker IP 134.209.127.249
persistence_mechanism: Continued use of valid long-term AWS access keys (no separate persistence mechanism established in AWS)
